description: Declaration of a father and husband, testifying that he had not married anyone before the mother of his first-born and that he had not sired a child before this one. Written by Ḥalfon b. Menashshe (ca. 1100-1138). (Information from Mediterranean Society, III, p. 279)
description_he: הצהרת אב ובעל המעיד שלא נשא אשה לפני אם בנו הבכור ולא הוליד ילד לפניו. נכתב על ידי חלפון ב' מנשה (כ-1100-1138).
